utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and details; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with cost and specific coverage details; travel_coverage includes coverage type, limits, and cost; additional_services lists various enhancement services; total_budget includes both monthly and annual cost breakdowns. Therefore, all 5 required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance selections: (1) 'EliteCare Premium Plan30 (physical health)' which corresponds to 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, rated 6. (2) 'EliteCare Premium Plan (Physical Health)4 (mental health)' corresponds to 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health, rated 3. (3) 'EliteCare Premium Plan29' for property coverage corresponds to 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, rated 6. (4) 'EliteCare Premium Plan28' for travel coverage corresponds to 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, rated 5. The additional services listed (concierge, priority claims, etc.) are part of the EliteCare/EliteHome/EliteTravel premium packages, not separate add-ons. Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived directly from the matching ground-truth items.
